top_findings: Studio/founder usability authority is still under-defined and must become an enforceable contract.
Some architect step language is still too abstract for lower-tier coders.
Soft semantic founder-surface acceptance wording must be tightened.
Promotion of better answers must become a governed canonical path rather than side-note drift.
recommended_promotions: Require architect handoffs to output both architecture and machine-execution artifacts.
Make SNT attack categories explicit and mandatory.
Freeze a Studio-owned founder usability contract artifact.
Add stronger coder_must_not_decide defaults to the canonical blueprint.
Require receipted promotion whenever ARC or SNT finds a better answer.
